name: Refine Issue
description: Forge Step 4 workflow: normalize GitHub issue parentage, ground in .ai contracts, triage tier-User questions, complete issue and contract refinement, and hand off to implementation. Proving workflow for repo-owned workflow definitions.

run_inputs.label: GitHub issue
run_inputs.description: GitHub issue URL, owner/repo#N, or issue number when the repository can be inferred from the selected workspace remote.
run_inputs.validation_hint: Use a full issue URL, owner/repo#N, or a bare issue number with repo inference from the selected repository.

metadata.run_input_issue_ref: Descriptive compatibility hint only; runtime start uses declared run_inputs.issue_ref.

artifacts.description: Phase A snapshot: issue body, milestone peers, linked .ai themes.
Phase B.5 tier-User questions (cap 8, blocker tags preserved).
Phase B.5 tier-SME assumptions and overflow reclassification.
Phase C answered tier-User decisions and session log.
Optional Phase B SME domain reports (excluding triage files above).

nodes.name: Normalize issue parentage
nodes.description: Resolve sub-issue links to the working parent issue before refinement proceeds.

nodes.name: Workspace prep (Phase A)
nodes.description: Create tmp session dir, origin/main worktree for .ai edits, and issue_context.md.

nodes.name: Ground in contracts (Phase B)
nodes.description: Read knowledge_map.json, milestone peers, and Open implementation decisions; produce question pass notes.

nodes.name: Validate triage artifacts
nodes.description: Confirm triage artifact files exist on disk before user verification.

nodes.name: User verification (Phase C)
nodes.description: Collect tier-User answers in batches of 3-5 questions; blockers first. Append to refinement.md.

nodes.name: Check tier-User blockers
nodes.description: Loop Phase C until every blocker in user_questions.md is Answered, Deferred with acceptance, or Superseded.

nodes.name: Complete refinement (Phase D)
nodes.description: Refine GitHub issue bodies, optional sub-issues, and complete in-scope .ai contracts in the main worktree.

nodes.name: Validate refine-issue exit criteria
nodes.description: Runtime domain gate before .ai commit and handoff.

nodes.name: Commit and push .ai contracts
nodes.description: Auto-commit and push completed .ai edits to main from the disposable worktree (Phase D step 5).

nodes.name: Board hygiene and handoff (Phase E)
nodes.description: Move project status when configured, remove worktree, publish handoff summary.

nodes.name: Refinement complete
nodes.description: Parent issue development-ready; in-scope Open implementation decisions resolved; .ai pushed to main.
